nasb.text: The secret of the Lord is for those who fear Him, And He will make them know His covenant.

esv.text: The friendship of the Lord is for those who fear him, and he makes known to them his covenant.

cnv.text: 耶和華把心意向敬畏他的人顯示， 又使他們認識他的約。

ccb.text: 耶和华与敬畏祂的人为友， 使他们认识祂的约。

csbs.text: 耶和华与敬畏他的人亲密， 使他们明白他的约。
